text.cn: 你第一次在中國做城際移動。12306 / 航司 App、實名制、證件核驗……這趟『交通事件』只會發生一次——之後你就『熟了』。
text.en: Your first intercity move in China. 12306 / airline apps, real-name tickets, ID checks… This transit event happens once — then you're 'experienced'.

text.cn: 用國內號順利收到驗證碼，線上取票進站。
text.en: Local number gets the SMS; e-ticket and enter smoothly.

feedback.cn: 進站像本地人。你第一次覺得 Tutorial 辦的卡沒有白辦。
feedback.en: You enter like a local. That Tutorial SIM finally pays rent.

text.cn: 窗口人工購票 / 用護照反覆嘗試取票機。
text.en: Buy at the counter / wrestle the passport ticket machine.

feedback.cn: 護照號碼少輸入一位，排隊重來。你學會了『仔細核對每一個字母』。
feedback.en: One missing passport digit — queue again. You learn to check every letter.

text.cn: 花小錢找『黃牛式』協助（不推薦，但慌的時候很香）。
text.en: Pay a little for 'helpful' middlemen (not advised; panic makes it tempting).

feedback.cn: 票是買到了，心裡留下一點『我不該這樣』的餘韻。
feedback.en: You got the ticket — and a lingering 'I shouldn't have' aftertaste.

text.cn: 車廂/機艙裡，你的手機電量正在危險區。隔壁旅客熱心地遞來一份連不了的公共 Wi-Fi 密碼。
text.en: Aboard, your battery hits the danger zone. A neighbor kindly shares a public Wi-Fi password that doesn't work.

text.cn: 掏出行動電源續命（或車站買一個天價的）。
text.en: Deploy a power bank (or buy an overpriced one at the station).

feedback.cn: 電量回升。你決定以後把『電』當成第四種生存資源。
feedback.en: Battery rises. You decide power is your fourth survival resource.

text.cn: 關掉螢幕睡覺/發呆，抵達再說。
text.en: Screen off. Sleep/zone out. Deal with it on arrival.

feedback.cn: 你抵達時像一顆沒電的土豆，但至少沒在路上崩潰。
feedback.en: You arrive like an unplugged potato — but you didn't melt down en route.

text.cn: 首次城際移動的『學費』繳完了。以後再出發，不會再觸發這段教學事件——但時間與金錢照樣會扣。
text.en: Tuition for your first intercity move is paid. This tutorial transit won't repeat — money and time still will.
